title: selaginella pubimarginata
intro: Selaginella pubimarginata is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as the resurrection plant due to its ability to survive in extreme conditions. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which can help to combat infections and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Selaginella pubimarginata include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water, and in some cases, it is also used in herbal supplements to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
